name: save_to_excel
description:
将表格数据保存为Excel(.xlsx)文件。支持两种模式：
1. 简单模式：仅提供headers、rows和filename，生成带基础样式的表格
2. 排版模式：额外提供formatting参数（JSON对象），精确控制多Sheet、单元格样式、数字格式、条件格式、图表等细节

当用户提出任何表格样式或排版要求时（如字体、颜色、边框、数字格式、条件格式、图表等），必须使用排版模式，提供formatting参数。

headers.description: （简单模式）Excel表头，多个表头用逗号分隔，例如：'姓名,年龄,城市'。排版模式下可为空字符串

rows.description: （简单模式）Excel数据行，每行用换行符分隔，行内各列用逗号分隔。例如：'张三,28,北京\n李四,32,上海'。排版模式下可为空字符串

filename.description: Excel文件名（无需扩展名），例如：'员工信息'、'销售报表'

formatting.description:
排版描述JSON对象。当用户有排版要求时必须提供。结构如下：
{
  "sheets": [{
    "name": "Sheet1",
    "tab_color": "#4472C4",
    "freeze_pane": "A2",
    "auto_fit_columns": true,
    "default_font": {"name": "宋体", "size": 11},
    "default_alignment": {"horizontal": "left", "vertical": "center"},
    "data": [["姓名", "年龄", "城市"], ["张三", 28, "北京"]],
    "merged_cells": [{"range": "A1:D1", "content": "标题", "style": {"font": {"bold": true, "size": 16}, "alignment": {"horizontal": "center"}}}],
    "styles": [
      {"range": "1:1", "style": {"font": {"bold": true, "color": "#FFFFFF"}, "fill": {"color": "#4472C4"}, "alignment": {"horizontal": "center"}}},
      {"range": {"column": "金额"}, "style": {"number_format": "thousands_2"}}
    ],
    "conditional_formats": [
      {"range": "B2:B100", "type": "cell_value", "operator": "greaterThan", "value": 100, "style": {"font": {"color": "#FF0000"}, "fill": {"color": "#FFCCCC"}}},
      {"range": "C2:C100", "type": "color_scale"},
      {"range": "D2:D100", "type": "data_bar"},
      {"range": "E2:E100", "type": "icon_set", "icon_style": "3Arrows"}
    ],
    "charts": [{"type": "bar", "title": "图表", "data_range": "A1:B10", "position": "E2"}]
  }]
}

数字格式预设：general/integer/decimal_1/decimal_2/thousands/thousands_2/currency/currency_usd/percent/percent_int/date/date_cn/datetime/time/text/scientific
条件格式type：cell_value/color_scale/data_bar/icon_set/formula
图表type：bar/line/pie

sheets.description: 工作表数组，每个元素描述一个Sheet

execution_prompt: 请编写Python代码，使用openpyxl库将表格数据保存为Excel文件。参数为：{params}。确保将文档保存到项目根目录下的'document_output/excel_output'文件夹中。如果文件夹不存在，请创建它。将生成的文档的完整文件路径赋值给变量result。只输出纯Python代码。
execution_code:
import sys
import os
import json
sys.path.insert(0, os.getcwd())
from agent.excel_formatter import create_excel_workbook

output_dir = os.path.join('document_output', 'excel_output')

fmt = None
if formatting and isinstance(formatting, str):
    try:
        fmt = json.loads(formatting)
    except:
        pass
elif formatting and isinstance(formatting, dict):
    fmt = formatting

result = create_excel_workbook(filename, headers=headers or '', rows=rows or '', formatting=fmt, output_dir=output_dir)
